title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Amrapali Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Amrapali Group
jsonLd.description:
Amrapali Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amrapali Group:
Amrapali Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amrapali Group!
